curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hint guidelines. The patch commit (3fff915) modifies only epyt_flow/serialization.py. The vulnerable code is in my_load_from_json's inner __object_hook function, which used importlib.import_module to dynamically import and instantiate any class specified via the __type__ field in JSON. The patch replaces this with an allowlist (JSON_SERIALIZABLE dict) that only permits pre-registered JsonSerializable subclasses. No sibling files share the vulnerability pattern. L3 hints were differentiated from L1/L2 to add specificity about the REST API and file-loading context. Vulnerability class insecure-deserialization confirmed from CWE-502 and advisory description.
